creator: hiren@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Wed, Sep 18, 2013 at 4:21 PM, Craig Leres <leres@xse.com> wrote:

> On 09/17/13 18:48, hiren panchasara wrote:
> > Can you share your version of clang?
>
> On 09/16/13 18:46, Craig Leres wrote:
> >     fun 6 % clang -v
> >     FreeBSD clang version 3.1 (branches/release_31 156863) 20120523
> >     Target: x86_64-unknown-freebsd9.0
> >     Thread model: posix
>

Mine (where things fail) is:

-bash-4.2$ /usr/bin/cc -v
FreeBSD clang version 3.3 (tags/RELEASE_33/final 183502) 20130610
Target: x86_64-unknown-freebsd10.0
Thread model: posix

So yes both are a year apart :-)

cheers,
Hiren
